final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing styled food photography image of Korean-cafe-style coffee and desserts, shot as if taken on a smartphone for Instagram, with no people, and hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays added to each element in the scene.

Style/medium: needs a Korean café aesthetic shot in a casual smartphone-Instagram style, with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include hand-drawn annotation lines per element: outline traces around objects, arrows and dashed lines as visual guides, steam wisps, sparkle marks, heart doodles, and small emoji-like decorations — spacing must preserve breathing room / negative space between annotations
Subject: must include Korean café-style coffee drink(s) and dessert/sweets (no people)
Scene/backdrop: needs a Korean café tabletop or counter atmosphere — exact backdrop is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, warm, Instagram-story atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a clean, fashionable direction with white annotation lines overlaid — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a casual, slightly rough hand-drawn line quality — exact pen weight and unevenness are yours
Text (verbatim): must include handwritten Japanese annotation text (7割ひらがな・3割かんじ) placed near each element, short diary-tone one-liners:
  • near drink → taste / temperature / mood (e.g. 「さわやか〜」「やさしい甘さ♡」)
  • near food → texture / deliciousness (e.g. 「しっとり」「さいこう…」)
  • near space/backdrop → atmosphere (e.g. 「ほっとする」「いい時間」)
  • overall summary → one-line feeling (e.g. 「しあわせすぎた〜」)
Constraints: must preserve hand-drawn rough single-stroke line style for all annotations; annotations must trace object outlines and use arrows/dashed lines for visual flow; decorative elements (steam, sparkles ✦, hearts ♡, small faces) must be present but restrained — not overcrowded
Avoid: people or human figures; overly digital or clean vector annotation style; cluttered annotations that eliminate negative space
